Copying from [[Category:Egyptian festival pages to be written]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
/* Overview */
revision.text:
'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:Egyptian festival pages to be written]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages to be translated]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:Egyptian festival pages to be written]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

revision.text:
'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. ''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]]

Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

revision.text:
'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:天の昇天]][[de:Erheben des Himmels]] ==References== [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事}}''. Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]

''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. '''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|ja|プタ|zh|普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|ja|古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|ja|新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|ja|創造|zh|创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|ja|新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|ja|ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|ja|メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|ja|天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|ja|アメン|zh|阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|ja|デンデラ|zh|丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|ja|ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|ja|ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|ja|叙称|zh|称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|ja|パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|ja|エスナ|zh|埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|ja|クヌム|zh|丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|ja|陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|ja|ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|ja|デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|ja|ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|ja|クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]

'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|zh|新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|zh|普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|zh|古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|zh|新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|zh|创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|zh|新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|zh|古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|zh|佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|zh|孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|zh|天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|zh|阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|zh|丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|zh|赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|zh|大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|zh|称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|zh|帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|zh|埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|zh|丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|zh|陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|zh|海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|zh|民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|zh|莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|zh|克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|zh|埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|7=ja|7=普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|7=ja|7=创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|7=ja|7=新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|7=ja|7=佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]

'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|7=ja|7=普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|7=ja|7=创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|7=ja|7=新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|7=ja|7=佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]

revision.text:
'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|12=draft}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|7=ja|7=普塔|12=draft}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=draft}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|12=draft}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|7=ja|7=创造|12=draft}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|7=ja|7=新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=draft}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|7=ja|7=佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|12=draft}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|12=draft}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=draft}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|12=draft}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|12=draft}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|12=draft}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|12=draft}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|12=draft}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|12=draft}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|12=draft}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|12=draft}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=draft}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=draft}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|12=draft}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|12=draft}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|12=draft}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=draft}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Religious Festival (Ancient Egypt)]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=draft]]
