II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Emergence|qq=}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis (Egypt)|qq=}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun|qq=}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dendera|qq=}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heryshaf|qq=}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Herakleopolis Magna|qq=}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epithet|qq=}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Amenhotep|qq=}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esna|qq=}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chnum|qq=}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis (Egypt)|qq=}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun|qq=}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dendera|qq=}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heryshaf|qq=}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Herakleopolis Magna|qq=}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epithet|qq=}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Amenhotep|qq=}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esna|qq=}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chnum|qq=}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== [[Category:pages that had Egyptian Calendar Navbar]] {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

'''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox Two-Column Hieroglyphs |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Kingdom|qq=}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|7=ja|7=普塔|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah|qq=}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Kingdom|qq=}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|7=ja|7=创造|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Creation|qq=}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|7=ja|7=新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Moon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|qq=draft|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|7=ja|7=佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Emergence|qq=}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis (Egypt)|qq=}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun|qq=}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dendera|qq=}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heryshaf|qq=}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Herakleopolis Magna|qq=}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epithet|qq=}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Amenhotep|qq=}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esna|qq=}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chnum|qq=}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navigation Bar}} ==References== [[Category:pages that had Egyptian Calendar Navbar]] {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esna|qq=}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chnum|qq=}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== [[Category:pages that had Egyptian Calendar Navbar]] {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

revision.text:
'''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Kingdom|qq=}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|de|Ptah|Ptah|4=ja|5=プタ|7=ja|7=普塔|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah|qq=}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom|de|Neues Reich|Neues Reich|4=ja|5=新王国|7=ja|7=新王国|lt=New Kingdom|lt_de=Neuen Reich|lt_ja=新王国|lt_zh=新王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Kingdom|qq=}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation|de|Schöpfung|Schöpfung|4=ja|5=創造|7=ja|7=创造|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Creation|qq=}} festival on the {{ill|New Moon|de|Neumond|Neumond|4=ja|5=新月|7=ja|7=新月|lt=first day|lt_de=ersten Tag|lt_ja=初日|lt_zh=第一天|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Moon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}} {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|qq=draft|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|7=ja|7=佩雷特|lt=Peret II|lt_de=Peret II|lt_ja=ペレトII|lt_zh=佩レトII|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Emergence|qq=}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis (Egypt)|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|Memphis (Ägypten)|4=ja|5=メンフィス|7=ja|7=孟菲斯|lt=Memphis|lt_de=Memphis|lt_ja=メンフィス|lt_zh=孟菲斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis (Egypt)|qq=}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=}} for {{ill|Amun|de|Amun|Amun|4=ja|5=アメン|7=ja|7=阿蒙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun|qq=}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|de|Dendera|Dendera|4=ja|5=デンデラ|7=ja|7=丹德拉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dendera|qq=}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|de|Herischef|Herischef|4=ja|5=ヘリシェフ|7=ja|7=赫里谢夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heryshaf|qq=}}, the Lord of {{ill|Herakleopolis Magna|de|Herakleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis Magna|4=ja|5=ヘラクレオポリス・マグナ|7=ja|7=大赫拉克利奥波利ス|lt=Herakleopolis|lt_de=Herakleopolis|lt_ja=ヘラクレオポリス|lt_zh=赫拉克利奥波利斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Herakleopolis Magna|qq=}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|de|Epitheton|Epitheton|4=ja|5=叙称|7=ja|7=称号|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epithet|qq=}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Pa-en-Amenhotep|de|Pa-en-Amenhotep|Pa-en-Amenhotep|4=ja|5=パ＝エン＝アメンホテプ|7=ja|7=帕恩·阿蒙霍特普|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pa-en-Amenhotep|qq=}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|de|Esna|Esna|4=ja|5=エスナ|7=ja|7=埃斯纳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esna|qq=}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Chnum|de|Chnum|Chnum|4=ja|5=クヌム|7=ja|7=丘努姆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chnum|qq=}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== [[Category:pages that had Egyptian Calendar Navbar]] {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|de|Demotische Chronik|Demotische Chronik|4=ja|5=デモティック・クロニクル|7=ja|7=民书纪事|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|lt_de=Die demotische Chronik|lt_ja=デモティック・クロニクル|lt_zh=民书纪事|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Demotic Chronicle|qq=}}''. Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|de|Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig|4=ja|5=ライナー・ハンニグ|7=ja|7=莱纳·汉尼格|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rainer Hannig|qq=}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|de|Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz|4=ja|5=クリスティアン・ライツ|7=ja|7=克里斯蒂安·莱茨|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Christian Leitz|qq=}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. revision.text:
'''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== [[Category:pages that had Egyptian Calendar Navbar]] {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret II]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Peret III]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}}

Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] [[Category:paes with no wikidata]]

Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[Category:paes with no wikidata]]

''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] }} [[sn:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] [[sn: failed]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[Category:Missing wikidata]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:23, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== [[Category:Translated page but missing wikidata]]{{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] [[Category:Foreign language page not connected to wikidata]]

In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:23, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''.
