''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

[[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:23, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}}

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:23, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

revision.text:
[[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:23, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by [[:en:Ptah|Ptah]]” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom]] and was celebrated as a [[:en:Creation myth|Creation]] festival on the [[:en:New moon|first day]] of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret II]] ({{Schef-bedet}}) in [[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis]]) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for [[:en:Amun|Amun]]”. In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In [[:en:Esna|Esna]], simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local [[:en:Khnum|Chnum]] festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

In the festival calendar of [[:en:Dendera|Dendera]], the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of [[:en:Heryshaf|Heryshaf]], the Lord of [[:en:Heracleopolis Magna|Herakleopolis]]” extended with an [[:en:Epithet|Epithet]], and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ([[:en:Paremhat|Pa-en-Amenhotep]]). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''[[:en:Demotic Chronicle|The Demotic Chronicle]]''. Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|en|Esna|WD=Q626031|lt=Esna}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Khnum|en|Khnum|WD=Q183097|lt=Chnum}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|en|Esna|WD=Q626031|lt=Esna}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Khnum|en|Khnum|WD=Q183097|lt=Chnum}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed parentheses]]

In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep}}). ''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle}}''. Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed parentheses]] [[Category:pages]]

[[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah|1=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian language|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation|1=Creation myth}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day|1=New moon}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II|1=Season of the Emergence}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis|1=Memphis, Egypt}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun|1=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera|1=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf|1=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis|1=Heracleopolis Magna}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet|1=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep|1=Paremhat}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|en|Esna|WD=Q626031|lt=Esna|1=Esna}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Khnum|en|Khnum|WD=Q183097|lt=Chnum|1=Khnum}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|1=Demotic Chronicle}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig|1=Djehuti}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz|1=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923|1=Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed parentheses]] [[Category:pages]]

Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah|1=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian language|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation|1=Creation myth}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day|1=New moon}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II|1=Season of the Emergence}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis|1=Memphis, Egypt}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun|1=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera|1=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf|1=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis|1=Heracleopolis Magna}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet|1=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep|1=Paremhat}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|en|Esna|WD=Q626031|lt=Esna|1=Esna}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Khnum|en|Khnum|WD=Q183097|lt=Chnum|1=Khnum}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|1=Demotic Chronicle}}''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923|1=Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed parentheses]]

revision.text:
[[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)]] '''Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)''' is an ancient Egyptian festival ==Overview== {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |TITEL = Raising of the Heaven |NAME = W3-D36:Aa1-Z7-Q3*X1:N1:N35
Heb ach-pet
''Ḥb ˁḫ-pt''
''Festival Raising of the Heaven'' |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} }} The festival “'''Raising of the Heaven''' by {{ill|Ptah|en|Ptah|WD=Q146321|lt=Ptah|1=Ptah}}” ({{ill|Ancient Egyptian language|de|Altägyptische Sprache|Altägyptische Sprache|4=ja|5=古代エジプト語|7=ja|7=古埃及语|lt=Ancient Egyptian|lt_de=altägyptisch|lt_ja=古代エジプトの|lt_zh=古埃及的|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian language|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト語|1=Egyptian language|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q50868}} '''Heb ach-pet''') has been attested since the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} and was celebrated as a {{ill|Creation myth|en|Creation myth|WD=Q215304|lt=Creation|1=Creation myth}} festival on the {{ill|New moon|en|New moon|WD=Q108566|lt=first day|1=New moon}} of the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=エジプト古代の月暦|7=ja|7=古埃及月历|lt=Lunar month|lt_de=Mondmonats|lt_ja=月の|lt_zh=月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q1944246|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar}} {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret II|1=Season of the Emergence}} ({{Schef-bedet}}) in {{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis|1=Memphis, Egypt}}) one month before the “{{ill|Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|4=ja|5=天の昇天（アメン）|7=ja|7=天的升起（阿蒙）|lt=Raising of the Heaven|lt_de=Erheben des Himmels|lt_ja=天の昇天|lt_zh=天的升起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heaven (Amun)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} for {{ill|Amun|en|Amun|WD=Q58373|lt=Amun|1=Amun}}”. In the festival calendar of {{ill|Dendera|en|Dendera|WD=Q29019|lt=Dendera|1=Dendera}}, the festival bore the extended name “Festival of the High Raising of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of {{ill|Heryshaf|en|Heryshaf|WD=Q939129|lt=Heryshaf|1=Heryshaf}}, the Lord of {{ill|Heracleopolis Magna|en|Heracleopolis Magna|WD=Q249480|lt=Herakleopolis|1=Heracleopolis Magna}}” extended with an {{ill|Epithet|en|Epithet|WD=Q207869|lt=Epithet|1=Epithet}}, and was scheduled for the first lunar day of Peret III ({{ill|Paremhat|en|Paremhat|WD=Q546893|lt=Pa-en-Amenhotep|1=Paremhat}}). Here too, the act of creation by Ptah was ceremonially reiterated, with particular reference to the cult site of the deity Heryshaf in Herakleopolis. In {{ill|Esna|en|Esna|WD=Q626031|lt=Esna|1=Esna}}, simultaneously with the festivals “Raising of the Heaven for Amun” and “Lifting of the Heaven by Ptah at the side of Heryshaf, the Lord of Herakleopolis”, the local {{ill|Khnum|en|Khnum|WD=Q183097|lt=Chnum|1=Khnum}} festival “{{ill|Setting of the Potter's Wheel|de|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|Festsetzen der Töpferscheibe|4=ja|5=陶芸車の定め|7=ja|7=陶轮的设定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setting of the Potter's Wheel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}” took place. The reasons for this lie in the special significance of Chnum in Esna, where he was revered as a creator god. == Literature == * {{ill|Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|de|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|Heinz Felber (Ägyptologe)|4=ja|5=ハインツ・フェルバー（エジプト学者）|7=ja|7=海因茨·费尔贝（埃及学家）|lt=Heinz Felber|lt_de=Heinz Felber|lt_ja=ハインツ・フェルバー|lt_zh=海因茨·费尔贝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heinz Felber (Egyptologist)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}: ''{{ill|Demotic Chronicle|en|Demotic Chronicle|WD=Q1186580|lt=The Demotic Chronicle|1=Demotic Chronicle}}''. In: Andreas Blasius: ''Apocalyptic and Egypt: A Critical Analysis of the Relevant Texts from Greco-Roman Egypt'' ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' No. 107). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1113-1, p. 99. * {{ill|Rainer Hannig|en|Rainer Hannig|WD=Q2128138|lt=Rainer Hannig|1=Djehuti}}: ''Great Handy Dictionary of Egyptian-German: (2800–950 BC)''. von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9, p. 170. * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz|1=Christian Leitz}}: ''Selection of Days: The Book ḥ3t nḥḥ pḥ.wy ḏt and Related Texts''. Harrassowitz, Wiesbaden 1994, ISBN 3-447-03515-3, p. 228. * Christian Leitz et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|4=ja|5=エジプト神と神名の辞典|7=ja|7=埃及神祇及神名辞典|lt=LGG|lt_de=LGG|lt_ja=LGG|lt_zh=LGG|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Gods and Divine Epithets|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q979923|1=Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen}}.'' Volume 3 ( = ''Orientalia Lovaniensia analecta.'' Volume 112). Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 90-429-1148-4, p. 168. {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar Bar}} ==References== {{translated page|de|Erheben des Himmels|version=71654470|comment=Imported full de history}} [[ja:天の昇天]] [[de:Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|qq=draft]] {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar}} [[en:Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)]] {{wikidata link|Q1331524}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]
